chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 222 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.2.2016 1. For Orders on Office Objection 2. For katcha peshi Mr. Imtiaz Ali Channa, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Shahid Shaikh, APG a/w HC Qazi Murtaza ACE Hyderabad, SIP Muhammad Kamil Dars ACE, Hyderabad and SIP Hadi Bux for SHO PS Market. Learned A.A.G. has filed comments stating therein that the official respondents are conducting themselves in accordance with law. Respondent Nos. 4 & 5 are present and state that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Learned counsel for petitioner has shown his satisfaction over the statement of respondent Nos. 4 and 5 and seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly this petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE *Karar/-
